symptom: Pod my-app in namespace production keeps restarting
kubectlOutput:
NAME     READY   STATUS      RESTARTS   AGE
my-app   0/1     OOMKilled   5          10m

Last State:     Terminated
  Reason:       OOMKilled
  Exit Code:    137

symptom: billing-api pod is in CrashLoopBackOff with 12 restarts
kubectlOutput:
NAME          READY   STATUS             RESTARTS   AGE
billing-api   0/1     CrashLoopBackOff   12         30m

Events:
  Warning  BackOff  1m  kubelet  Back-off restarting failed container

symptom: New deployment pods are stuck in Pending
kubectlOutput:
NAME              READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE
web-frontend-xyz  0/1     Pending   0          15m

Events:
  Warning  FailedScheduling  default-scheduler  0/3 nodes are available: 3 Insufficient cpu.

symptom: Pod cannot start, showing image pull error
kubectlOutput:
NAME        READY   STATUS             RESTARTS   AGE
api-server  0/1     ImagePullBackOff   0          5m

Events:
  Warning  Failed   kubelet  Failed to pull image "myregistry.com/api:v2.1": rpc error: code = NotFound desc = manifest unknown

symptom: Frontend pod cannot connect to backend service
kubectlOutput:
$ kubectl get endpoints backend-svc -n production
NAME          ENDPOINTS   AGE
backend-svc   <none>      2h

$ kubectl get pods -n production -l app=backend
NAME           READY   STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE
backend-abc    1/1     Running   0          2h

NAME          STATUS     ROLES    AGE   VERSION
worker-01     NotReady   <none>   90d   v1.28.5
worker-02     Ready      <none>   90d   v1.28.5

Conditions:
  Type             Status
  MemoryPressure   True
  DiskPressure     False
  Ready            False

symptom: Java application container keeps getting OOMKilled despite 4Gi memory limit
kubectlOutput:
Container: app
  Limits:  memory: 4Gi
  Requests: memory: 2Gi
  Last State: Terminated, Reason: OOMKilled, Exit Code: 137

$ kubectl top pod java-app -n production
NAME       CPU   MEMORY
java-app   200m  3.8Gi

symptom: kubectl suddenly returns x509 certificate has expired error
kubectlOutput: Unable to connect to the server: x509: certificate has expired or is not yet valid: current time 2026-04-10T08:00:00Z is after 2026-04-09T23:59:59Z

symptom: API server requests are taking 10+ seconds to respond
kubectlOutput:
$ kubectl get componentstatuses
NAME                 STATUS      MESSAGE
etcd-0               Unhealthy   context deadline exceeded
scheduler            Healthy     ok
controller-manager   Healthy     ok

symptom: Newly deployed version crashes immediately, previous version was working
kubectlOutput:
NAME              READY   STATUS             RESTARTS   AGE
app-v2-xyz        0/1     CrashLoopBackOff   8          20m

$ kubectl logs app-v2-xyz --previous
Error: FATAL: password authentication failed for user "appuser"
connection to server at "db.internal" port 5432 failed
